name: forge_upgrade
description: Forge prefers upgrade over craft when stockpile allows. Seed Inventory=[rusty_axe, rusty_axe] + ore=5. Place Forge on Worker1's spawn. Worker arrives ~1s, first cycle (~t=7) sees 2 rusty_axes + 5 ore → upgrade path: spend 2 rusty + 3 ore, push 1 iron_axe. Final ore=2, inventory=[iron_axe].
